name: LiterallyGoogle
author: SoPat712
description: A Google-like theme with a sticky header and full-width plugin slots.

settingsSchema.label: Engine Performance (mobile)
settingsSchema.description: Default open/closed state for the Engine Performance sidebar panel on narrow screens.
optionLabels: Open during search, then collapse when complete

settingsSchema.label: Engine Performance (desktop)
settingsSchema.description: Default open/closed state for the Engine Performance sidebar panel on laptop and desktop.
optionLabels: Open during search, then collapse when complete

settingsSchema.label: People also search for (mobile)
settingsSchema.description: Default open or collapsed state for the related searches sidebar panel on narrow screens.

settingsSchema.label: People also search for (desktop)
settingsSchema.description: Default open or collapsed state for the related searches sidebar panel on laptop and desktop.

settingsSchema.label: Sticky sidebar
settingsSchema.description: Keep the sidebar pinned below the header while scrolling results (desktop only).

settingsSchema.label: Image mode layout (desktop)
settingsSchema.description: Choose whether the filters and engine performance rail appears to the left or right of the preview panel on laptop and desktop image search.
optionLabels: Filters / Engine Performance left, Preview right
Preview left, Filters / Engine Performance right

settingsSchema.label: Knowledge panel (mobile)
settingsSchema.description: Default open or collapsed state for Wikipedia and knowledge plugin panels in the sidebar.

settingsSchema.label: Knowledge panel (desktop)
settingsSchema.description: Default open or collapsed state for Wikipedia and knowledge plugin panels in the sidebar.
